data.description:

Astrana Health ( (ASTH) ) has issued an announcement.

On July 2, 2025, Astrana Health reported that it had completed the acquisition of all outstanding equity interests in Prospect Health Plan, Inc. and Alta Newport Hospital, LLC, along with substantially all assets of certain PHP Holdings subsidiaries, under a November 8, 2024 purchase agreement. The company has now released interim unaudited financial statements for the acquired PHP Holdings and Rhode Island operations and a pro forma statement of operations as if the deal had closed on January 1, 2025, offering investors greater visibility into the acquired business’s assets, liabilities and earnings profile and the transaction’s potential impact on Astrana’s balance sheet and capital structure.

Technicals are mixed, with better short-term trend but weaker long-term momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on ASTH stock, click here.

The company expands its footprint by integrating health plans and acute care facilities, targeting regional markets where it can scale value-based care and coordinated delivery models.

data.title: Star Equity Updates Investor Presentation, Highlights Growth Strategy
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Hudson Global ( (STRR) ).

Star Equity Holdings furnished an updated investor presentation on March 30, 2026, detailing its business and operations as of December 31, 2025, and clarifying that the materials are supplemental to its regulatory filings and not deemed filed under U.S. securities laws. The presentation highlights 2025 pro forma financials, including $224.7 million in revenue, $95 million in gross profit and $12.6 million in adjusted EBITDA, outlines a vision to grow adjusted EBITDA to about $40 million by 2030, emphasizes approximately $215 million of U.S. net operating loss carryforwards to enhance tax efficiency, and underscores a capital allocation strategy centered on organic growth, opportunistic acquisitions, and share repurchases, including roughly $10 million of stock buybacks since 2020 and an 8% block repurchase in the third quarter of 2025.

The company also notes the completion of its August 22, 2025 acquisition of Star Operating Companies, Inc., which now operates as a wholly owned subsidiary, and references a subsequent name and ticker change effective September 5, 2025, signaling a consolidation of its operating structure under the Star Equity brand. Management positions the group as a logical aggregator of select microcaps with an open-ended investment horizon, targeting outperformance of and eventual inclusion in the Russell 2000 Index, while acknowledging a broad range of operational, financial, macroeconomic, and regulatory risks that could affect execution of its strategy and financial targets.

The most recent analyst rating on (STRR) stock is a Hold with a $9.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hudson Global stock, see the STRR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on STRR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, STRR is a Neutral.

STRR scores as middling primarily due to weak financial quality (ongoing losses and cash burn despite improved revenue and gross margin). Technicals are neutral-to-soft with the stock below key moving averages, while valuation is constrained by a negative P/E. The earnings call adds some support from improving adjusted metrics and buyback activity, but is tempered by a wider net loss and segment headwinds.

To see Spark’s full report on STRR stock, click here.

More about Hudson Global

Star Equity Holdings, Inc. is a diversified holding company that operates through four divisions covering business services, building solutions, energy services, real estate assets, and other investments. The company pursues a strategy similar to a private equity fund, focusing on scalable operating platforms, bolt-on acquisitions in select microcap verticals, and flexible deal structures using cash, debt, and preferred stock to drive long-term value.

data.title: Newton Golf Announces CEO Ouster and Interim Leadership Shift
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Newton Golf Company ( (NWTG) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 27, 2026, Newton Golf Company, Inc. removed Greg Campbell from his roles as Executive Chairman, Chief Executive Officer and principal executive officer, signaling a significant leadership change for the company. On the same date, co-founder and long-time Chief Technology Officer Akinobu Yorihiro, a former corporate M&A partner and media executive with extensive cross-border and entertainment industry experience, was appointed Interim Chief Executive Officer and principal executive officer, while Brett Hoge was named Chairperson of the Board of Directors.

The company emphasized that Yorihiro has no family ties or disclosable related-party transactions with existing executives or directors, and that there were no special arrangements determining his selection as interim CEO. His compensation remains unchanged despite assuming the interim chief executive role, underscoring a transition framed as a continuity-focused internal appointment rather than a broader restructuring of executive pay or governance terms.

The most recent analyst rating on (NWTG) stock is a Hold with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Newton Golf Company stock, see the NWTG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NWTG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NWTG is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by deep unprofitability and ongoing cash burn despite strong revenue growth and high gross margins. Technicals are neutral with mixed long-term trend signals, valuation is limited by negative earnings and no dividend, and recent corporate updates on record revenue expectations and expansion provide a modest offset.

data.description:

Cartesian Therapeutics ( (RNAC) ) just unveiled an update.

On March 26, 2026, Cartesian Therapeutics, Inc. disclosed that Board member Murat Kalayoglu, M.D., Ph.D., intends to resign from the Board effective March 31, 2026, after serving since 2023. Kalayoglu, who chaired the Science and Technology Committee and sat on the Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee, is leaving to pursue other opportunities, and the company emphasized that his departure does not stem from any disagreement over its operations, policies or practices.

With his resignation, Kalayoglu will also step down from his committee roles, prompting a reshuffle of scientific and governance oversight within the boardroom. Cartesian publicly thanked him for his advice and leadership, signaling an orderly transition that, while removing an experienced scientific voice from the board, is not expected to indicate internal conflict or immediate disruption for stakeholders.

GCL Global Holdings ( (GCL) ) has issued an announcement.

GCL Global Holdings Ltd, a Singapore-based foreign private issuer with SEC-reporting obligations, prepares consolidated financial statements under U.S. GAAP and operates within a cross-border regulatory framework. Its governance structure includes an audit committee that oversees the appointment and evaluation of independent external auditors for its U.S. filings.

On March 24, 2026, GCL Global Holdings’ board dismissed Marcum Asia CPAs LLP and appointed Ernst & Young LLP Singapore as its new independent registered public accounting firm for audits of financial statements to be filed with the SEC. The company reported no disagreements with Marcum Asia over its March 31, 2024 and 2025 audits, though prior material weaknesses in internal controls were noted, and Marcum Asia later confirmed its agreement with the company’s description of the auditor transition in a March 26, 2026 letter to the SEC.

data.title: Red Metal to Return Capital via In Specie Distribution of Maronan Metals Shares
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Red Metal Limited ( (AU:RDM) ).

Red Metal Limited has notified the ASX of a return of capital to shareholders via an in specie distribution of securities in Maronan Metals Limited, which is already listed on the exchange. The transaction applies to Red Metal’s fully paid ordinary shares and is structured as a non-selective capital reduction, meaning all eligible shareholders will participate.

By distributing Maronan Metals shares directly, Red Metal is effectively transferring part of its investment in the related entity back to its investors, altering the composition of its balance sheet while maintaining shareholder exposure to Maronan’s prospects. The move may refine Red Metal’s capital structure and portfolio focus, while giving shareholders direct holdings in Maronan, potentially improving transparency and liquidity for investors in both companies.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:RDM) stock is a Hold with a A$0.12 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Red Metal Limited stock, see the AU:RDM Stock Forecast page.

More about Red Metal Limited

Red Metal Limited is an Australian-listed resources company trading under the ASX code RDM, with a focus on mineral exploration and development. Its operations are structured around equity interests in other listed entities, including Maronan Metals Limited (ASX: MMA), which provides exposure to additional exploration and project development opportunities in the mining sector.

data.title: Enegex Confirms Broad Gold System in Côte d’Ivoire with Strong Maiden Aircore Results
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Enegex Limited ( (AU:ENX) ) just unveiled an update.

Enegex Limited has reported strong maiden aircore drilling results from the Kalama Bave prospect within its Tougbe exploration permit in Côte d’Ivoire, confirming multiple shallow gold-mineralised zones in weathered chlorite schist. The program, comprising 94 shallow holes to an average depth of 30 metres, showed that around half of the holes contained reportable gold intercepts, including several high-grade intervals from surface or near-surface.

The drilling has validated earlier auger anomalies and demonstrated that the gold system is broad and, in places, open to the limits of current drilling, prompting plans for additional aircore drilling in the coming weeks to extend coverage. Enegex also plans deeper reverse circulation drilling to test the mineralised zones in fresh rock below 25 metres, which could significantly advance resource delineation and enhance the company’s positioning in a previously undrilled gold district of Côte d’Ivoire.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:ENX) stock is a Sell with a A$0.19 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Enegex Limited stock, see the AU:ENX Stock Forecast page.

More about Enegex Limited

Enegex Limited is an ASX-listed mineral exploration company focused on gold exploration, currently advancing projects in Côte d’Ivoire. The company is targeting greenfield prospects within the Tougbe-Gogo permit group, including the Kalama Bave prospect, where it is using auger, aircore and reverse circulation drilling to delineate new gold mineralised systems.

Average Trading Volume: 187,017

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$61.5M

data.title: RMI Maps Priority Gold Targets at Saudi Shaib Marqan Project
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Resource Mining Corporation Limited ( (AU:RMI) ) has provided an update.

Resource Minerals International has completed a high-resolution ground magnetic survey over 91.88 square kilometres at its Shaib Marqan gold project in Saudi Arabia’s Arabian Shield, marking the first phase of systematic work on the licence. The survey defines seven major fault systems and multiple structural corridors considered highly prospective for gold, building on earlier rock sample assays of up to 40.35 grams per tonne.

The results have allowed the company to delineate four priority target zones, labelled Z1 to Z4, that will be the focus of immediate follow-up exploration and drilling. RMI plans to begin rock chip sampling over these zones shortly, followed by an initial 5,000-metre drilling program, a step that could materially advance the project’s evaluation and strengthen the company’s position within Saudi Arabia’s emerging gold sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:RMI) stock is a Hold with a A$0.03 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Resource Mining Corporation Limited stock, see the AU:RMI Stock Forecast page.

More about Resource Mining Corporation Limited

Resource Minerals International Ltd is an ASX-listed exploration company focused on gold and base metals, with a growing portfolio in Saudi Arabia’s Arabian Shield. Its primary assets include the Shaib Marqan and Wadi Salamah projects, targeting structurally controlled gold and associated mineral systems in underexplored terranes.

Average Trading Volume: 573,793

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$24.71M
